title: Building long-running AI agents with ADK
summary: A tutorial on building long-running AI agents using Google's open-source Agent Development Kit (ADK). The ADK enables stateless, event-driven AI systems with a coordinator agent pattern that delegates specialized tasks to sub-agents while maintaining clean reasoning chains.
writeup: This tutorial from Google Cloud Tech walks through building long-running AI agents with Google's open-source Agent Development Kit (ADK). The ADK supports stateless, event-driven systems organized around a coordinator agent pattern, where a top-level agent delegates specialized tasks to sub-agents. The architecture keeps reasoning chains clean while coordinating work across a multi-agent system. Concepts covered include agent orchestration and the decorator pattern.
